mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, description, icon_url, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM scenic_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scenic_category ( category_name, description, icon_url, sort_order, status ) VALUES ( #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{iconUrl}, #{sortOrder}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1) )
mapper.update:
UPDATE scenic_category
category_name = #{categoryName},
description = #{description},
icon_url = #{iconUrl},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE scenic_category SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
